Autonomic Testing 
To use the sharing features on this page, please enable JavaScript. 
What is autonomic testing? 
Autonomic testing helps find out if your autonomic nervous system (ANS) is working as well as it should. Your ANS controls body functions that happen automatically (without you thinking about them). These functions include your breathing, heartbeat, body temperature, and digestion. If there are problems with the function of your ANS, it's known as autono
